# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Resolved the pending child-process leak amendment in tests/cli.rs by changing wait_for_child_exit to kill and reap the spawned helper process before panicking on timeout. This preserves the existing bounded wait behavior while ensuring a run-stop regression cannot leave the long-lived shell orchestrator running in the rest of the CI job.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the pending amendment and confirmed wait_for_child_exit was the timeout path used by the newly unignored long-lived signal tests.","order":0,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Updated wait_for_child_exit so the deadline path calls child.kill() and child.wait() before panicking, including both cleanup results in the panic message for diagnostics.","order":1,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Validated the affected SIGKILL and SIGTERM run-stop tests directly, then ran the full requested gates.","order":2,"status":"completed"}],"validation_evidence":["nix develop -c cargo
